rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(191, 219, 254), rgb(31, 55, 85));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Raw EHR Data Sources
• MIMIC-III / MIMIC-IV / eICU tables
• Diagnoses, procedures, meds, encounters
• Demographics (age, sex)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Preprocessing & Mapping
• Extract per-encounter event sequences
• Normalize: ICD → SNOMED, Drug/NDC → RxNorm
• Build splits + vocab + audit logs

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 805px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Normalized Record Store
• Record = {events, demographics, raw_codes}
• Canonical tokens used by all modules
• Keeps traceability for debugging

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 215px; margin-left: 372px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Baseline Anomaly Detector
• Sequence model (GRU / Transformer)
• Outputs detection score: S_det(X)
• Optional: token-level surprise

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 580px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Diffusion Generative Model
• Ontology-regularized generative prior
• Outputs generative score: S_gen(X)
• Optional: denoised / recon candidates

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 795px; margin-left: 669px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Ontology Engine
• Mappings + concept graph (SNOMED/RxNorm)
• Rule checks → violations[]
• Ontology score: S_ont(X) + labels/relations

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(191, 219, 254), rgb(31, 55, 85));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 325px; margin-left: 852px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Score Orchestrator / Calibrator
• Aggregates: S_det, S_gen, S_ont
• S_cal(X) = w1·S_gen + w2·S_ont
• Builds ScorePack + metadata

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 265px; margin-left: 1302px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Counterfactual Generator
• Edits: add / remove / replace (ontology-valid)
• Objective: min λ·#edits + S_cal(X′)
• Returns X* + edits[] + before/after scores

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(191, 219, 254), rgb(31, 55, 85));

div.div:

• Violations + top contributors
• Minimal fix (X*) + score reduction
